taskSummary: Replace galactic-archive with a production-grade Choose Your Side portfolio experience.

acceptanceCriteria: The galactic-archive route becomes a real Light Side vs Dark Side portfolio experience instead of static copy.
Switching sides transforms the scene, UI styling, motion, and sound cues with persistent state across navigation.
The page includes hero, about, skills, projects, timeline, contact, and live archive search sections.
The implementation uses a focused Three.js/react-three-fiber scene plus a GLSL-backed transition overlay.
SWAPI metadata is integrated through shared wrappers under src/shared/api/swapi/ without leaking Effect into React layers.
The implementation passes typecheck, lint, tests, and runtime verification on port 4000.
constraints: Do not stop services on port 3000.
Keep the feature under the existing reference-patterns module family.
Use placeholder portfolio content and non-copyright placeholder sound cues when needed.

plan.summary: Build a server-first Galactic Archive portfolio with a client experience container for side switching, live search, audio cues, and WebGL transitions, backed by shared SWAPI wrappers and dynamic 3D scene loading.

qualityGates.lastRunSummary: check-types, lint, and test all passed after the Galactic Archive portfolio implementation; Next.js runtime diagnostics on port 4000 reported no errors in active browser sessions.

delivery.notes: Galactic Archive is now a live Choose Your Side portfolio with SWAPI-backed data, persistent side switching, live search, and runtime-safe WebGL fallback. Reference hub and onboarding copy were updated to reflect the live example.
